gt_only_interventions.fp_demotion_oracle: demote unmatched-FP scores below all non-FP scores; no native threshold exists, so this is not literal filtering
gt_only_interventions.duplicate_order_oracle: within a real conflict component, permute score values to place unique TP ahead of a duplicate that competes for the same GT; preserve final instance count
gt_only_interventions.conflict_order_oracle: inside real non-singleton conflict components, permute native score multiset by oracle utility; preserve final instance count
gt_only_interventions.merge_risk_demotion_oracle: demote only detached leave-one-out TP-harming merge-risk predictions
gt_only_interventions.full_score_oracle: replace score with detached unique-TP utility times unchanged edge penalty
